Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: working through the DECLARE constraint semantics to build out the dictionary with bias mitigating rules and their explanations making sure I capture the correct logical relationships like responded existence and coexistence constraints

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: Im adding existence constraints for BiasMitigationCheck and exactly one for FinalDecision to ensure a single final decision

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Ill exclude any automatic rejection based on demographic profiles then layer in responded existence rules so demographic checks trigger bias mitigation coexistence constraints linking minority specific decisions and manual review together and precedence rules ensuring bias checks happen before approvals or rejections

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: For the demographic checks themselves Im preventing them from directly causing rejections or approvals through nonchainsuccession constraints

Name: Hypothesis Generation - IND
Text: I should also add a noncoexistence constraint between SkipManualReview and Reject Minority to prevent skipping review when rejecting minorities

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Then Ill use chainprecedence to ensure BiasMitigationCheck always immediately precedes FinalDecision making bias mitigation a mandatory step before any final decision is made

Name: Validation - IND
Text: Attribute level bias detection requires data aware constraints beyond control flow so Ill suggest DECLARE or MP Declare for more granular checks

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - PE
Text: Im being careful not to force ManualReview globally coexistence constraints handle the conditional cases better

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Now Im verifying the chain and succession constraints work together CheckApplicantRace flows into BiasMitigationCheck which then chains into FinalDecision and RequestAdditionalInfo has its own succession rules

Name: Hypothesis Generation - NE
Text: I should also add a nonchainsuccession constraint for Approve to prevent it from immediately following the bias check maintaining symmetry since bias could favor certain outcomes

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: For the cardinality constraints FinalDecision should occur exactly once though BiasMitigationCheck can happen multiple times so Ill keep it as an existence constraint

Name: Validation - IND
Text: Ill include a consistency validation section that documents conflicting constraints to avoid like ensuring SkipManualReview and Reject Minority dont coexist then add an activity glossary and a brief note on how to verify the model using tools like pm4py
